topic: Apply 059 stress-test methodology to sk-improve-agent triad — produce gap analysis, sketched stress-test scenarios, prioritized diff sketches, and recommended fixture-target design

manualOrchestration.note: This packet's iterations are dispatched via a manual shell loop (.opencode/specs/.../060-.../research/run-iterations.sh) rather than through the YAML workflow runner. Each iteration spawns copilot with a prompt that reads prior iteration summaries to preserve fresh-context-per-iteration discipline. Convergence is checked via diminishing-returns heuristic on findings-registry.json.
manualOrchestration.rationale: YAML workflow runner is agent-driven; manual dispatch gives a clean shell-script loop suitable for monitoring and resumption.
